name: Hampus Bosson
headline: Full-stack developer with a strong backend focus, building technically ambitious products across real-time systems, interactive web experiences, and full-stack application architecture.
summary: I am a full-stack developer who enjoys building products with real engineering depth, especially where backend architecture, product design, and interactive frontend work meet. My projects often explore realtime collaboration, 3D interfaces, API design, queue-driven workflows, and AI-assisted features, because I like systems that are both technically demanding and genuinely useful. I care about building things that feel thought through end to end, from architecture and data flow to clarity of interaction and overall product quality.

education.degree: Bachelor's in Computer and Systems Sciences
